# Why do some of us age faster than others? A conversation with Terrie Moffitt at the American Psychological Association

##### January 15, 2025

Terrie Moffitt at the American Psychological Association

A conversation with Terrie Moffitt at the American Psychological Association

In this new episode of the American Psychological Association’ podcast “Speaking of Psychology”, Terrie Moffitt speaks about why some of us age faster than others. Listen [here](https://www.apa.org/news/podcasts/speaking-of-psychology/aging-process) .
